title: ci-implementability.json
description: Phase-1-end empirical dry-run verification artifact required by ADR-042 §4.3 (lines 523-526) before the Phase 2 CI flip is authorized. Records per-tool dry-run results across the 20 tools in the §21.1 stack. Empirical, not asserted.

schema_version.description: Schema version; must match the version of this file.

phase_1_end_sha.description: Git SHA at which the dry-run was performed. Must be the merge commit of the Phase-1 closing PR.

branch.description: Branch name on which the dry-run executed.

ci_runner.description: Identifier of the CI runner that produced the artifact (e.g. 'github-actions/ubuntu-latest').

tools.description: Per-tool dry-run records. Every tool in the ADR-042 §21.1 stack MUST appear.

tool.description: Tool identifier; one of the 20 tools in the §21.1 stack.

version.description: Reported tool version string (whatever the tool prints to --version).

command.description: Exact command line that was invoked.

ran_to_completion.description: True iff the tool process exited within its budget AND produced its expected output file.

exit_code.description: Process exit code. Conventionally 0 for clean, non-zero for findings.

total_findings.description: Empirical total finding count from the dry-run.

sarif_emitted.description: True iff a SARIF log was produced (either natively or via the converter in .workflow/ci/sarif/).

sarif_path.description: Repo-relative path to the emitted SARIF log when sarif_emitted is true.

ratchet_decision.description: Decision the ratchet wrapper would emit if this run were compared against the seeded zero baseline.

notes.description: Free-form text capturing edge cases, e.g. tool-specific quirks.
